site. Edit by chat. No code required.

THE FUTURE OF WORDPRESS

Everything you need. Nothing you don't.

AI-powered toolkit designed to take your ideas from a blank canvas to a fully functional website in minutes.

Edit your site by chat.

Want to change a section, swap an image, rewrite the homepage?
live editing indicators
SugarPress Editor
Make the hero headline shorter and add
Update hero section and CTA
Hero section updated and CTA button added.

Designed in Figma? Import directly.

Turn your designs into responsive, editable WordPress pages.
Generate Website

Built to rank. Built to load fast.

AI-generated meta tags, schema markup, and Core Web Vitals optimization out of the box.

Clone any site by URL.

Drop a URL. SugarPress recreates it as an editable WordPress site you own.
Tranforming

Real features, added by AI.

Forms, bookings, calendars, member areas, added when you ask.

AI can be generic. Real designers aren't.

Want a homepage that doesn't look AI-built? Work with a Sugar Design Group designer to craft a custom homepage by hand.
The AI learns your style and applies it across every page you generate after — so you start from a designed foundation, not from AI defaults.
Add a new product to my catalog

Sell from day one.

WooCommerce pre-configured. Manage products, payments, inventory, and shipping, all from your WordPress dashboard.
HOW IT WORKS

From idea to live website in four steps.

1

2

3

4

Tell SugarPress about you

A brief sentence about who you are and what you do.

Describe what you need

A few lines about what it does, what it looks like. Upload reference screenshots.

Let AI do the rest

SugarPress generates your full
WordPress site. Vibe code your way to perfection.

Publish

Connect your domain. SSL, hosting, backups, speed — all included.
TWO WAYS IN

Start a new site,
or convert your existing one.

START FRESH

Building from scratch?

Tell SugarPress what you need. In minutes, you'll have a complete WordPress site ready to refine and publish. No templates to hack, no code to write.

SugarPress AI
CONVERT YOUR SITE

Already have WordPress?

Bring it over and convert it onto the AI compatible SugarPress theme. Do it yourself, or have Sugar Design Group do it. Once converted, you're fully autonomous.

Built on infrastructure trusted by

2M+

WordPress sites built

60K+

Plugins available

99.9%

Uptime guarantee

90+

Real team behind it
BUILT BY HUMANS WHO KNOW WORDPRESS

Over a decade of WordPress. Now powered by AI.

SugarPress is a product from Sugar Design Group — consistently rated five stars on Google, with over a decade of WordPress builds behind us.

When the AI gets you 90% of the way there, real humans are here for the last mile. Real designers can craft your homepage by hand. Stuck on something else? Our team can take over.

QUESTIONS

The honest answers.

What's the difference between SugarPress and other AI website builders?

Do I need to know WordPress?

Nope. If you can describe your business in a sentence, you can build a SugarPress site. The AI handles thetechnical side. If you do know WordPress, you'll feel right at home — it's the same backend you've always used.

What if my site looks too AI-generated?

Can I edit my site after the AI builds it?

I already have a WordPress site. Can I bring it over?

What does it cost?

Can I move my site somewhere else later?

Do you offer a "build it for me" option?

When does SugarPress launch?

AI for WordPress
is here.

Be first in line when SugarPress opens.

SugarPress AI
A product from Sugar Design Group · Based in Vancouver, BC · Available worldwide
